'''Blackwing'''<ref name="Script">[[The High Republic: Tempest Runner (script)|''The High Republic: Tempest Runner'' script]]</ref> was a [[Nihil]] [[pirate]] serving [[Jinnix's Storm|under]] the [[Storm (rank)|Storm]] [[Jinnix]] in [[Pan Eyta]]'s [[Pan Eyta's Tempest|Tempest]]. Blackwing was killed by the [[Twi'lek]] [[mercenary]] [[Lourna Dee]] during the [[raid in the Abrion sector]].<ref name="Tempest Runner" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Blackwing's voice appeared in a flashback in the [[2021]] audio drama ''[[The High Republic: Tempest Runner]]'', written by [[Cavan Scott]] and performed by a full voice cast.<ref name="Tempest Runner" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The High Republic: Tempest Runner]]'' {{1st}} {{Voice}} {{Flash}}
